description: Health-check section derived from run_results.json and the manifest. Present even when run_results.json is absent (fail-soft, testResults=null). The shape of each dimension and testResults entry is rich and may evolve; additionalProperties is true throughout.

$schema.description: Relative path to this document's JSON Schema.

dimensions.description: One entry per DPE dimension (testing, modeling, documentation, structure, performance, governance). Each value is {issues, checked, findings}.

enabled.description: True when health data is available (at least one result was processed).  False means generate ran without a run_results.json.

note.description: Human-readable note set when run_results.json was absent.

testResults.description: Per-test pass/fail detail from run_results.json, or null when the file was absent.

title: dbdocs api/v1/health.json
